items.title: Italy’s largest bank more than doubles crypto holdings to $235M in Q1: Report
items.whyYouShouldCare: Italy's largest bank increasing its crypto holdings signals growing institutional confidence in digital assets, potentially boosting SOL's market perception and liquidity.

items.title: Jump Crypto’s ‘Firedancer’ is taking a slow and steady approach to its long-awaited Solana infrastructure rollout
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jump Crypto's gradual rollout of its infrastructure for Solana may enhance network reliability and user experience, positively impacting ecosystem usage.

items.title: It’s a ‘new era’ for crypto users who ‘trade anything and everything’ as Jito goes consumer, CEO Bruder says
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's shift to consumer-focused services could expand trading opportunities on Solana, driving more activity and liquidity within the ecosystem.
